character.definition: (simplified form of 寫) to write; to draw
a rush and impatient disposition, (non-classical form 狷) rash; quick-tempered; narrow-minded, honest and straightforward
millstone; grindstone, to rub; to grind; to polish; to wear, to sharpen (a knife), to train; to harden; to temper
a dual pronoun, I, you and me, we two
Mi(luo) river in Hunan province where Qu Yuan drowned himself; to sink; (used erroneously for 汩)
Convolvulus, bindweed; parasitic plants such as mistletoe; Ribes ambiguum
short coat, jacket; fine silk fabric
